name: henry-beast-bot-v19
description: Henry v19™ Beast Bot — AI-powered WhatsApp automation with multi-session pairing
_comment_new_deps: jimp/form-data required by Delta pack (megajs optional, only for .megabackup/.megarestore). Everything from api-qasim through yt-search is required by Henry v20 ported commands — mongoose/pg/mysql2/better-sqlite3 are only used by a handful of commands with optional DB backends; safe to leave uninstalled/ignore errors on those specific commands if you don't use that DB.
_comment_libs: baileys-antiban is vendored locally at ./libs/baileys-antiban (prebuilt CJS, no install needed). Its optional proxy-rotation feature needs http-proxy-agent/https-proxy-agent/socks-proxy-agent if you ever enable proxyRotator — not required for the default setup.
author: Henry Tech (@henrytech254)
